import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './RolePlay.css'; const MOCK_CHARS = [ { id:1, story:'Restaurant Conversation', name:'Customer', emoji:'👤', order:1, lines:3 }, { id:2, story:'Restaurant Conversation', name:'Waiter', emoji:'🧑‍🍳', order:2, lines:3 }, { id:3, story:'Hospital Visit', name:'Patient', emoji:'🤒', order:1, lines:2 }, { id:4, story:'Hospital Visit', name:'Doctor', emoji:'👨‍⚕️', order:2, lines:2 }, { id:5, story:'Hospital Visit', name:'Nurse', emoji:'👩‍⚕️', order:3, lines:0 }, { id:6, story:'Airport Check-In', name:'Traveler', emoji:'🧳', order:1, lines:4 }, { id:7, story:'Airport Check-In', name:'Officer', emoji:'👮', order:2, lines:3 }, { id:8, story:'Airport Check-In', name:'Pilot', emoji:'✈️', order:3, lines:3 }, { id:9, story:'Airport Check-In', name:'Staff', emoji:'💁', order:4, lines:2 }, { id:10,story:'Cafe Order', name:'Customer', emoji:'👤', order:1, lines:2 }, { id:11,story:'Cafe Order', name:'Barista', emoji:'☕', order:2, lines:2 }, ]; export default function RolePlayCharacters() { const [search, setSearch] = useState(''); const [chars, setChars] = useState(MOCK_CHARS); const filtered = chars.filter(c => c.name.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) || c.story.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) ); const handleDelete = (id) => { if (window.confirm('Delete this character?')) { setChars(prev => prev.filter(c => c.id !== id)); } }; return (
